name: @jeswr/kernel-e9-defl-prep
description: E9-defl deflationary-control-kernel prep (poc/e9/README.md, new pre-registration): structure-matched semantically-scrambled explications through the pinned encoder + X4 JL 8192->576, consumed by the E5 nonce-transfer instrument. The GPU runner lives in runner/.

scripts.defl: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/deflVocab.js
scripts.vectors: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/vectors.js
scripts.manifest: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/manifest.js
scripts.inputs: npm run defl && npm run vectors && npm run manifest
scripts.test: npm run build && nice -n 10 node --test dist/test/*.test.js
